title: $strobe and $monitor fail inside of task and with task output as argument
body:
Verilator 5.010 on Debian 11 5.10.0-23-amd64 throws error:

 %Error: Internal Error: ../make_hello_c/../make_hello_c/top.v:41:42: ../V3Scope.cpp:80: Can't locate varref scope

if you try to call $strobe or $monitor in a task with task's inputs/outputs. The same code works fine with Questa.

Regression case attached to this description (remove .txt extensions before using).

[t_strobe_task.pl.txt](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/files/12071342/t_strobe_task.pl.txt)
[t_strobe_task.v.txt](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/files/12071343/t_strobe_task.v.txt)
